title: Rock Layers
description: An extreme close-up of a sedimentary rock face, the camera panning slowly across it. Folded, undulating strata pinch and swell in ochres, iron reds and creams, laminated with fine cross-bedding, while a soft raking light drifts over the beds for relief. Layer thickness, folding, cross-bedding, pan speed, vertical drift and light warmth are live and mappable.
